description: ShareableSummaryStatus reports aggregate capacity for a pool that contains devices with AllowMultipleAllocations.

capacity.description: Capacity reports aggregate total, consumed, and available amounts per shareable capacity key across the pool.

fullyAvailableDevices.description: FullyAvailableDevices is the number of shareable devices with no capacity consumed.

partiallyAvailableDevices.description: PartiallyAvailableDevices is the number of shareable devices with some but not all capacity consumed.
